title: Software Engineer

stack_mentions.source_text: Candidates should have 7+ years of software engineering experience, including at least 4 years working on Python backend systems.
Strong PostgreSQL schema design and query optimization skills are required.
Experience building and maintaining REST APIs in production is important.
Docker and CI/CD experience are preferred.

seniority_text_evidence: You will also mentor other engineers and help drive technical decisions across services.
Candidates should have 7+ years of software engineering experience, including at least 4 years working on Python backend systems.
